name: Escape Observation
short_description: You wake up in an endless loop within a mystery room, and you must pay attention to the signals given to you by the changes in each room in order to find the right way out.
detailed_description:
You wake up in an endless loop within a mystery room, and you must pay attention to the signals given to you by the changes in each room in order to find the right way out. Some of these changes will be useful and some will be useless. At first, the game will be puzzle orientated, and once you know what to look for, it's up to you to notice it!

‘Escape Observation’ is a short walking simulator inspired by the game ‘The Exit 8’, where you can only move your character and control your vision. It is important to note that the game is not about finding out if a room has changed, but rather that each room is different and you must be aware of the signals that these changes give you.

Game Flow

  • Phase 1

Find out the rules of the game

Objective: To pass through the correct corridor in room 8.

It is easier to notice the changes and find the rules in this part of the game.

  • Phase 2

Escape from the room

Objective: To pass through the correct corridor of room 12.

This is the main part of the game where the changes become harder to find.

  • Endless

Challenge yourself

Objective: Reach as many rooms as possible.

The larger the number of rooms you reach, the harder the changes will be to notice.

Noticeboard Menu

To find the menu, go to the notice board.

Features

-Different Modes

-Noticeboard Menu

-Achievements

-Leaderboard

-3D Graphics

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
